About Ace Headwear

02

Ace Headwear is a Guangzhou-based cap manufacturer offering full OEM / ODM development — from pattern making to finished product — across eight core headwear categories. Fabric, decoration technique and hardware are combined to order for every buyer.

  • Eight headwear categories, from baseball caps to kids' novelty shapes
  • 10+ fabrics and 20+ back-closure hardware options in stock
  • Embroidery, rhinestone, appliqué and print decoration in-house

ACE HEADWEAR
Back-closure hardware

HARDWARE
& CLOSURE

Hardware & Closure

13

Twenty-plus closure styles are available, shown in full on the reference sheet opposite — from metal and plastic buckles to Velcro, elastic and bow-tie ties.

  • Metal buckles: debossed, embossed, silver or brushed finish
  • Plastic buckles: 7-hole, snap and Velcro closures
  • Novelty ties: elastic band, bow-knot, drawstring
